site.title: Toaster Studio
site.description: A three-person studio in Ljubljana working with teams in defense, finance, governance, and selected commercial clients.

footer.tagline: Ljubljana · Working with teams in defense, finance, governance

home.title: Toaster Studio
home.lede: Every project is a living system. We work where the parts meet.

hero.lineParts: the client, the audience, the work, the people building it.
hero.lineResolution: We keep all four moving together.

integral.label: 01 / The view
integral.lede: Most projects fail not in the parts but in the spaces between them. A beautiful design that the team can't operate. A working system the audience won't trust. A clever tool nobody asked for. We work where the parts meet.

client.title: The client.
client.body: The team that has to live with the result long after we leave. If the work doesn't fit how they actually operate, it dies on contact.

audience.title: The audience.
audience.body: The people the work is made for. Defense procurement officers, banking compliance teams, citizens reading a government portal — each reads the same artefact differently. The work has to land for them, not for us.

work.title: The work itself.
work.body: The artefact, the system, the interface. It has its own logic, constraints, and lifespan. We let it tell us what it wants to be, instead of forcing a template onto it.

people.title: The people building it.
people.body: Us, our partners, the tools we run. Three people, banking-grade engineering through Inetis, AI infrastructure where it belongs. The making is part of the system, not separate from it.

services.label: 02 / Two ways to work
services.intro: Two ways to work with us.

build.title: Build.
build.summary: A project. Defined scope, shipped result, end date.
build.body: Sites, systems, interfaces, identities. Delivered by the studio for standard scope, jointly with Inetis when the work needs banking-grade engineering.

adopt.title: Adopt.
adopt.summary: A relationship. Your team learns to operate AI capability without us in the room.
adopt.body: Three phases over three to six months: audit, pilot, embed. Founder-led, weekly cadence. The goal is your team's independence, not our retention.

liveProof.label: 03 / In production
liveProof.title: Live proof — TBD
liveProof.note: Color Grading Agent and other interactive proofs to be embedded here once project selection and embed format are decided.

work.label: 04 / Selected work
work.subtitle: A few projects that show how we hold the four parts together. Not a portfolio — a sample.

cta.label: 06 / Start
cta.text: We take on three to five new clients each quarter. We pick the ones where the four parts have a chance of moving together.
cta.textEmphasis: the four parts have a chance of moving together
cta.secondary: If that sounds like your project, tell us about it. We respond personally within one working day.
